mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HERO_SKILLS_INFO ( HERO_NO, SKILL_LCLICK_NAME, SKILL_LCLICK_DESC, SKILL_LCLICK_IMG, SKILL_RCLICK_NAME, SKILL_RCLICK_DESC, SKILL_RCLICK_IMG, SKILL_SHIFT_NAME, SKILL_SHIFT_DESC, SKILL_SHIFT_IMG, SKILL_E_NAME, SKILL_E_DESC, SKILL_E_IMG, SKILL_Q_NAME, SKILL_Q_DESC, SKILL_Q_IMG ) VALUES ( #{heroNo}, #{skillLclickName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillLclickDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillLclickImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillRclickName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillRclickDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillRclickImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillShiftName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillShiftDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillShiftImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillEName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillEDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillEImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillQName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillQDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillQImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM HERO_INFO ORDER BY HERO_NAME ASC
